  1. org.xmlunit.assertj

Uses of Package
org.xmlunit.assertj

Packages that use org.xmlunit.assertj
Package
Description
org.xmlunit.assertj
AssertJ assertions on top of XMLUnit's core.
  • Classes in org.xmlunit.assertj used by org.xmlunit.assertj
    Class
    Description
    CompareAssert
    Assertion methods for XMLs comparison.
    MultipleNodeAssert
    Assertion methods for Iterable of Node.
    SingleNodeAssert
    Assertion methods for Node.
    ValidationAssert
    Assertion methods for XML validation.
    ValueAssert
    Assertion methods for String result of XPath evaluation.
    XmlAssert
    Entry point for fluent interface for writing assertions based on AssertJ library.
